description: Designed for those who never compromise on style and comfort, this pair of leather slippers from ganuchi is a great addition to your wardrobe. UpperWide leather straps in thong style, with a toe separator and a padded fabric inner lining to hold the foot in place in comfortErgonomically curved suede footbed for style and all-day comfortOutsoleTPR outsole with textured leaf-styled lugs on the forefoot and heel for enhanced grip and traction on various surfacesSlipper careUse a branded leather conditioner for the straps if necessaryClean the footbed with a suede brushDo store in direct sunlight
